messages.content: Build a chat message pipeline in RxJS v7: a Subject<DraftMessage> feeds sent messages through optimistic UI (append pending) then resolves to an ack status. Typed, no any.
How do I wire a chat input's keydown Enter events into a send stream that emits a typed DraftMessage in RxJS v7? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly how optimistic UI works with a chat ack pipeline in RxJS v7, then show a working typed implementation.
Write an RxJS v7 chat outbox that dedupes repeated sends of the same message id within 300 ms. Constraints: strict types, no any, Subject for drafts.
Add a typing indicator capability to this chat input stream: const drafts$ = new Subject<Draft>();
Refactor this RxJS v7 chat send stream to extract a reusable withOptimistic operator: outbox$.pipe(mergeMap(d => merge(of({id:d.id,status:'pending'}), send$(d))))
Build a file upload pipeline in RxJS v7 with a cancel Subject and a scan-based progress reducer. Emits typed UploadEvent.
How do I model a cancellable file upload progress stream in RxJS v7? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly how to combine a Subject cancel signal with a scan-based progress accumulator in RxJS v7, then show a working typed implementation.
Write an RxJS v7 upload stream that pushes UploadState events. Constraints: strict types, Subject for cancel, scan to accumulate bytes, no any.
Add a pause/resume capability to this RxJS v7 upload pipeline: upload$(total).pipe(takeUntil(cancel$))
Fix this RxJS v6 upload cancel fragment to v7 idioms: progress$.pipe(takeUntil(cancelClick$))  with a legacy side-effect logger attached to cancelClick$
Build a toast/notification stream in RxJS v7 that queues incoming toasts and auto-dismisses each after 3s. Typed Toast, no any.
How do I auto-dismiss RxJS v7 toast notifications after a delay without blocking the stream? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly how RxJS v7 can implement a toast queue with configurable per-toast TTL, then show a working typed implementation.
Write an RxJS v7 toast stream that keeps a rolling list of currently visible toasts via scan. Constraints: strict types, no any, BehaviorSubject exposed as Observable.
Add a maxVisible=3 capability to this v7 toast queue: incoming$.pipe(mergeMap(t => merge(of({show:t}), of({dismiss:t.id}).pipe(delay(t.ttl)))))
Build a toast stream in RxJS v7 where critical toasts use an 8s TTL and normal toasts use a 3s TTL. Typed Toast with priority.
Build a dashboard metrics stream in RxJS v7 that combines cpu$, mem$, rps$ into a typed Metrics ViewModel using combineLatest. No any.
How do I derive a typed dashboard ViewModel from N real-time metric streams in RxJS v7? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly how combineLatest waits for all sources in a dashboard context, then show a working typed implementation with three metric streams.
Build a dashboard pipeline in RxJS v7 that shares a single combineLatest of metrics across multiple UI subscribers using shareReplay(1). Typed Metrics.
Build an infinite scroll fetcher in RxJS v7: a scroll$ Subject<void> triggers the next page via switchMap, and scan accumulates items. Typed Page.
How do I build an RxJS v7 infinite-scroll pipeline that cancels the in-flight page fetch if the user scrolls faster? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly why scan-plus-switchMap is the right combo for infinite scroll in RxJS v7, then show a working typed implementation.
Write an RxJS v7 infinite-scroll that stops fetching after hasMore is false. Constraints: strict types, no any, switchMap for the page fetch.
Add a loading-indicator capability to this RxJS v7 infinite scroll: scroll$.pipe(scan((n)=>n+1,0), switchMap(p => fetch$(p)))
Refactor this v7 pagination pipeline to share results across two subscribers: scroll$.pipe(scan((n)=>n+1,0), switchMap(p => fetch$(p)), scan(...))
Build a form with cross-field dependencies in RxJS v7: combineLatest of country$, state$, postcode$ feeds a typed FormVm with validity flags.
How do I make an RxJS v7 form field enable/disable based on another field's value? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly how RxJS v7 combineLatest enables cross-field validation in a form, then show a working typed implementation.
Write an RxJS v7 form pipeline with debounced username availability check. Constraints: strict types, no any, switchMap for the async check.
Build an RxJS v7 form stream that computes a typed Vm with submitDisabled and errors from name$ and email$ BehaviorSubjects. Strict types.
Fix this RxJS v6 form fragment to v7 idioms: combineLatest(name$, email$) -- positional args plus a legacy side-effect logger attached with the pre-v7 observer-style operator.
Build a background task status poller in RxJS v7: interval switchMap fetchStatus takeWhile status not done. Typed JobStatus.
How do I poll a background job in RxJS v7 until it finishes, without stacking in-flight requests? Show a minimal example.
Build a background job poller in RxJS v7 with retry-on-error and exponential backoff. Typed Status, retry({count,delay}), switchMap into the fetch, no any.
Build an RxJS v7 pipeline that tracks many chat conversations concurrently with bounded parallelism. Use mergeMap with concurrency 3 and typed events.
How do I aggregate two independent dashboard fetches in parallel and emit once they both resolve in RxJS v7? Show a minimal example.
Build an RxJS v7 upload progress stream that multicasts to two subscribers (a progress bar and a telemetry logger) using shareReplay. Typed Progress.
Build an RxJS v7 infinite scroll where initial page 0 fetches on subscribe and subsequent pages fire on scroll$. Typed Row[], strict, no any.
Build an RxJS v7 polling stream for dashboard metrics that refreshes every 5s, ignoring overlapping in-flight requests, and exposing a BehaviorSubject-backed snapshot.
